overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Venice Beach-style waterfront area. The character moves along a paved promenade past shops, briefly enters an outdoor muscle gym, then transitions onto the sand to observe people working out at beach exercise stations before walking toward the ocean past concrete bleachers.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the open-air muscle gym, walking past weight benches and exercise equipment enclosed by blue railings. A muscular man stands near the equipment inside. The character then exits back onto the promenade, with the gym structure now behind.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the busy promenade past the Sandy Rings shop and other storefronts, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The scene transitions as the character steps from the concrete pavement onto the sandy beach area.

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the sandy beach workout area, approaching a woman in a white bikini doing barbell curls. Pull-up bars and exercise equipment are scattered across the sand, with concrete bleachers visible in the distance and the ocean beyond.

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the beach workout area, passing a woman doing pull-ups in a blue top and a man doing push-ups on the sand. Parallel bars and various exercise stations dot the sandy landscape, with a concrete shower structure visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the beach workout area toward numbered concrete structures and tiered bleachers. The ocean becomes visible on the horizon as the character moves toward the water's edge, with the exercise equipment now left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny urban promenade into a sandy beach workout area that eventually opens up to the ocean horizon. It begins with the character walking past a coffee stand and palm trees before veering right to enter an open-air muscle gym filled with weight benches and blue railings. After exiting the gym, the camera follows the character back onto the busy promenade past various storefronts, including the Sandy Rings shop, before transitioning from the concrete pavement onto the sand. The scene then shifts into a beach exercise zone, moving past people performing barbell curls and pull-ups among scattered equipment and parallel bars. Finally, the camera pushes past a concrete shower structure and tiered bleachers, leaving the workout area behind as it advances toward the water's edge.
